title: S4e: migrate onboarding (58 anchors, 20 unparsed) — the largest area so far
action: Standard area migration — identical contract to cell f2-5 (read it, plus commit 3d69a2d). TARGET docs/specs/onboarding.md, expect 58 anchors {B10, R28, ...} / 20 unparsed blocks (the 20 are unnumbered behaviour paragraphs — declare honestly, never invent ids, D10). At 689 source lines and 58 anchors this needs a genuine multi-concept topic split; derive it after reading the whole source. Note its rule set includes R20b (letter-suffixed) — the widened classifier reads it, and the stub anchor map must carry it. Same STEP 0-4, prohibitions, RED-FIRST. Chain grows to 72 suites.

truths: coverage: 58 anchors, 58 owned, 0 duplicated, 0 lost — including R20b
fidelity min/median quoted above the floor with no concept edited
telemetry row inside band, or an honest finding if the correct shape falls outside it
prohibitions: never invent ids for the 20 unnumbered blocks (D10)
never edit a concept or lower a threshold

trace.outcome: onboarding migrated to docs/knowledge/areas/onboarding/ (8 concepts, 58/58 anchors owned incl. R20b, fidelity 1.000, telemetry inside band); stub + 58-row anchor map, chain gate wired (72 suites)
